reviews.review_title: The first game that I really enjoy
reviews.review_description: Works fine for me so far and is actually fun unlike most other vr games that I've tried (I don't have a controller so maybe other games are good too) colourful, fun and addictive!
I put a few hours in a couple of times and lost all of my progress. ..wrote the devs for some advice and never heard back. Gave up trying to complete the game for now.
